chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. B.A.No.S-1162 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-14919/2021 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on MA-14920/2021 4. For hearing of main case. 21.12.2021. Mrs. Razia Ali Zaman Patoli, advocate a/w applicant. *.-*-.*-.*-.*-.*-.*-.*-.*-.*-.* 1. Urgency granted. 2. To be complied with within one week’s time. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. The applicant Ubaidullah has been booked in Crime No.118 of 2021 registered at PS Cantonment Hyderabad for offence under Section 489-F PPC and seeks pre-arrest bail. Per the FIR, the complainant alleges that he was issued three cheques by the applicant, out of which one cheque of Rs.3,000,000/- (Rupees thirty lac) dated 19.10.2021 was dishonored for insufficient funds. Learned counsel submits that the cheque in question has been forged with the signature of the applicant by the complainant who was the applicant’s partner, and that the account on which the cheque was drawn had infact being lying dormant for the last two years. She submits that the FIR is malafide lodged with the sole intent to harass and humiliate the applicant whose arrest is imminent. Be that as it may, without touching the merits of the case the applicant / accused is admitted to interim pre-arrest bail subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.200,000/-and PR bond in like amount to the satisfaction of learned Additional Registrar of this Court. Notice to Addl.P.G and complainant. To come up on 03.01.2022 for confirmation or otherwise. Applicant / accused is directed to attend. J U D G E Ahmed/Pa,
